name: sloping crawlway
hints: A sloping crawlway with starving rats! They're dangerous.
The rats will attack you if you stay. You need to scare them off.
SHO RAT to fire the pistol and scare the rats away with the noise.
SHO RAT scares rats (the noise, not the aim). N=altar room (14). GO PAS returns to sitting room (16) if the passage is open.
notes: Sloping crawlway with dangerous rats. SHO RAT with pistol scares them away. N=altar room (14), GO PAS=sitting room (16).
